description_long: This object is a cylindrical, black camera lens with a textured grip and a light gray plastic cap on top. The lens features detailed white and red markings, including aperture and focal length indicators, as well as branding such as 'SONY' and 'G'. There are several switches and toggles on the side, including an AF/MF switch and a click on/off toggle, suggesting it is a high-quality, functional camera lens. The body is primarily composed of matte black plastic and metal, with ribbed sections for grip and control. The lens cap is made of plastic and fits securely over the front element, protecting the glass inside. The overall construction appears robust and designed for frequent handling in urban or professional photography settings.
description: A robust, black cylindrical camera lens with a textured grip, detailed markings, and a light gray plastic cap. Features include switches, toggles, and prominent branding.
description_view_0: Front view shows the aperture and focal length markings, as well as the ribbed grip and the light gray lens cap.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the 'G' branding, AF/MF switch, and the E-mount label near the cap.
description_view_2: Rear side displays regulatory markings, model number, and additional technical information.
description_view_3: Side view features the 'SONY' logo, aperture ring, and the click on/off toggle switch.
attribute_labeling_or_markings: brand logos, model numbers, aperture and focal length markings, regulatory symbols
